American Ancestry of David Knight

State / Colony — click to isolate

Colors run as a geographic gradient — Florida through Illinois and up to New Hampshire — so neighboring states are neighboring colors. Click a state here or on the map to wash out all others. Click any slice to open a person and zoom to them; the slice turns white while selected. Zoom in to reveal names. Faint dashed grey wedges mark branches whose ancestry is still undocumented.
